query:
ALTER TABLE course_bundles 
ADD COLUMN price INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'Price in cents',
ADD COLUMN discountPercentage INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'Discount percentage off individual course prices',
ADD COLUMN stripeProductId VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN stripePriceId VARCHAR(255)
